summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Catalogo page UI enhancements. All backend API endpoints pass (13/13 tests). Frontend features verified: Tela/Entalle dropdowns, S/ price format, stock matrix dialog with location filter, totals per row/column/grand total, and variant detail table.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement needed

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/catalogo returns products with stock
Backend: GET /api/catalogo?marca=X filters by marca
Backend: GET /api/catalogo?tela=X filters by tela
Backend: GET /api/catalogo?entalle=X filters by entalle
Backend: GET /api/catalogo/marcas returns distinct marca values
Backend: GET /api/catalogo/tipos returns distinct tipo values
Backend: GET /api/catalogo/telas returns distinct tela values (43 options)
Backend: GET /api/catalogo/entalles returns distinct entalle values (35 options)
Backend: GET /api/catalogo/{tmpl_id}/matriz?location_id=ALL returns matrix with tallas, colores, matrix, totals, locations
Backend: GET /api/catalogo/{tmpl_id}/matriz?location_id={id} filters by location
Backend: Matrix totals per color row calculated correctly
Backend: Matrix totals per talla column calculated correctly
Backend: GET /api/catalogo/{tmpl_id}/variantes returns variant detail rows
Frontend: Tela filter is dropdown (SelectTrigger/button), not text input
Frontend: Entalle filter is dropdown (SelectTrigger/button), not text input
Frontend: Price column shows 'S/' prefix (e.g., S/ 25.00, S/ 66.00) - Peruvian Soles format
Frontend: 'Ver' button opens matrix dialog with Color x Talla grid
Frontend: Matrix shows totals per color row (verified: 32, 49, 15, 105, etc.)
Frontend: Matrix shows totals per talla column (verified: 326 for S, 298 for M, 25 for L)
Frontend: Matrix shows grand total (verified: 649)
Frontend: Location dropdown in matrix dialog (19 options including 'Todas las ubicaciones')
Frontend: Location filter works (tested: ALL=649, AP=24)
Frontend: 'Ver detalle por variante' toggle shows variant detail table (37 rows with Barcode, Talla, Color, Disponible columns)
action_items: Optional: Add aria-describedby to DialogContent for accessibility compliance
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Catalogo page features working correctly. Key test product: CLASIC (tmpl_id=4102) has 649 total stock across S/M/L sizes and 15 colors. 19 store locations available for filtering. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_catalogo.py can be reused for regression testing.
